creator: pauls@utdallas.edu
text:
--On April 27, 2008 4:10:03 AM +0000 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> 
wrote:

> Maintainer of security/barnyard-sguil6,
>
> Please note that PR ports/123059 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/123059

I'm looking in to it now, but I'm at a conference, so my time is limited. 
In addition, I just submitted the updates to sguil-0.7.0, so I will test 
with the new version and correct any problems that are encountered for 
that version.

Paul Schmehl (pauls@utdallas.edu)
Senior Information Security Analyst
The University of Texas at Dallas
http://www.utdallas.edu/ir/security/
